name: Spirit Descending Like a Dove
oracleText: Create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Scry 1.
flavorText: "And the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove upon him." — Luke 3:22
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide.
